title: Bridge Essay: Dopamine neurons modulate neural encoding and expression of depression-related b

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Water/Pleasure** (Phase 5) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Water/Pleasure to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Dopamine neurons modulate neural encoding and expression of depression-related behaviour.** — Nature. PMID: 23235822. DOI: 10.1038/nature11740. Major depression is characterized by diverse debilitating symptoms that include hopelessness and anhedonia. Dopamine neurons involved in reward and motivation are among many neural populations that have been hypothesized to be relevant, and certain antidepressant treatments, including medications and brain stimulation therapies, can influence the complex dopamine system.
